case_title: NELSON MADRIGAL RESPONDENT VS. HECTOR RENE ZAFAROLLI APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIM APPEAL HEARD. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. EVIDENCE PRESENTED. THE COURT AWARDS PLAINTIFF $5,000 AND $22 COSTS. JUDGE, PRO TEM, PETER HADIARIS;CLERK, T.MARUYAMA (DEPT. 525)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT MADRIGAL, NELSON RECOVER FROM APPELLANT ZAFAROLLI, HECTOR RENE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,022.00, SEE SCANNED DOC

MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Plaintiff In Pro Per, Nelson Madrigal
